subtitle.en: Run open-source AI models on serverless GPUs
subtitle.zh: 用無伺服器 GPU 跑開源 AI 模型

tagline.en: Call powerful AI models with a single line of code — no GPU to buy, no server to manage.
tagline.zh: 一行程式碼就能呼叫強大的 AI 模型——不用買 GPU，也不用管伺服器。

text.en: Workers AI lets you run ready-made, open-source AI models (chatbots, translation, image generation, speech-to-text and more) directly on Cloudflare's global network of GPUs, just by calling an API.
text.zh: Workers AI 讓你直接呼叫 API，就能在 Cloudflare 全球的 GPU 上跑現成的開源 AI 模型（聊天機器人、翻譯、生成圖片、語音轉文字等等）。

text.en: Normally, running an AI model means renting an expensive GPU server, installing complex software, and keeping it online 24/7. Workers AI removes all of that: Cloudflare owns the GPUs, you just send a request and get the answer back.
text.zh: 一般要跑 AI 模型，你得租很貴的 GPU 伺服器、安裝一堆軟體、還要 24 小時開機。Workers AI 把這些麻煩全拿掉：GPU 是 Cloudflare 的，你只要送出請求、拿回答案就好。

title.en: Think of it like a restaurant

text.en: You don't build a kitchen or hire chefs to eat a great meal — you just order from the menu. Workers AI is the kitchen of GPUs; the model catalog is the menu; you simply place your order (a request) and the dish (the answer) arrives.
text.zh: 想吃一頓好料，你不必自己蓋廚房、請廚師——直接點菜就好。Workers AI 就是那間裝滿 GPU 的廚房，模型清單就是菜單，你只要點菜（送出請求），菜（答案）就會端上桌。

text.en: Workers AI removes the three biggest pains of doing AI yourself: cost, complexity, and distance from your users.
text.zh: 自己搞 AI 有三大痛點：花錢、麻煩、離使用者太遠。Workers AI 把這三個都解決了。

text.en: GPUs cost thousands of dollars. Here you pay only for what you use, and get a free daily allowance to experiment.
text.zh: 一張 GPU 動輒上萬。這裡只按用量付費，而且每天還有免費額度可以試玩。

text.en: Models run on Cloudflare's worldwide network, so answers come back fast wherever your users are.
text.zh: 模型在 Cloudflare 全球網路上執行，不管使用者在哪，回應都很快。

text.en: Use popular open models like Llama, Mistral and Whisper without signing separate contracts with each provider.
text.zh: 可以直接用 Llama、Mistral、Whisper 等熱門開源模型，不必跟每家廠商個別簽約。

text.en: Every model is called the same way — swap one model name for another to switch tasks.
text.zh: 每個模型的呼叫方式都一樣——換一個模型名稱，就能切換不同任務。

text.en: Build a Q&A bot or writing helper using a large language model (LLM, 大型語言模型).
text.zh: 用大型語言模型（LLM）做問答機器人或寫作小幫手。

text.en: Turn text into other languages or shrink long articles into short summaries.
text.zh: 把文字翻成別的語言，或把長文章濃縮成短摘要。

text.en: Create pictures from a text description using text-to-image models.
text.zh: 用文字生成圖片的模型，從一句描述變出一張圖。

text.en: Transcribe audio into text with speech models like Whisper.
text.zh: 用 Whisper 之類的語音模型，把錄音轉成文字。

text.en: Turn text into embeddings (向量, number lists that capture meaning) to power semantic search and RAG.
text.zh: 把文字轉成 embedding（向量，一串能代表語意的數字），用來做語意搜尋和 RAG。

text.en: Detect sentiment, tag images, or sort messages into categories automatically.
text.zh: 自動判斷情緒、為圖片貼標籤，或把訊息分門別類。

text.en: You'll use Wrangler, Cloudflare's command-line tool for Workers. The steps below create a Worker, connect it to AI, and deploy it.
text.zh: 你會用到 Wrangler，也就是 Cloudflare Workers 的命令列工具。下面的步驟會建立一個 Worker、把它接上 AI，然後部署。

text.en: Install the CLI globally, then log in to your Cloudflare account in the browser.
text.zh: 全域安裝這個命令列工具，然後在瀏覽器登入你的 Cloudflare 帳號。

text.en: A binding (繫結) is a setting that wires your Worker to a Cloudflare service. Add this to wrangler.jsonc so env.AI becomes available in your code.
text.zh: binding（繫結）是一段設定，把你的 Worker「接線」到某個 Cloudflare 服務。把下面這段加進 wrangler.jsonc，程式裡就能用 env.AI。

text.en: Use env.AI.run() with a model name and an input. Here we ask Llama 3.1 a question.
text.zh: 用 env.AI.run()，傳入模型名稱和輸入。這裡我們向 Llama 3.1 問一個問題。

text.en: Publish your Worker to the world with one command.
text.zh: 一個指令就能把你的 Worker 發佈到全世界。

text.en: Prefer no Worker? Use the REST API
text.zh: 不想寫 Worker？直接用 REST API

text.en: You can also call any model straight from the command line (or any backend) with a single HTTP request and an API token.
text.zh: 你也可以用一個 HTTP 請求加上 API 權杖（token），直接從命令列（或任何後端）呼叫任何模型。

text.en: Inference is the moment a trained model 'thinks' and produces an answer for your input. Each call you make is one inference.
text.zh: 推論就是訓練好的模型「思考並產生答案」的那一刻。你每呼叫一次，就是一次推論。

text.en: A menu of 50+ models, each with an ID like @cf/meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct. Pick one for your task.
text.zh: 一份超過 50 個模型的菜單，每個都有像 @cf/meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct 的代號。依任務挑一個用。

text.en: The wiring that exposes AI inside your Worker as env.AI — no API keys to paste into your code.
text.zh: 把 AI 接進 Worker、變成 env.AI 的那條線——不必把金鑰貼進程式碼裡。

text.en: Cloudflare's unit for measuring AI usage (the GPU work a request needs). You get 10,000 free every day.
text.zh: Cloudflare 衡量 AI 用量的單位（一次請求需要的 GPU 運算量）。每天送你 10,000 個免費額度。

text.en: A list of numbers that captures the meaning of text. Store them in Vectorize to build search and RAG.
text.zh: 一串能代表文字語意的數字。把它存進 Vectorize，就能做搜尋和 RAG。

text.en: You get 10,000 Neurons free every day (resets at 00:00 UTC). Beyond that, the paid plan is $0.011 per 1,000 Neurons — only pay for what you actually use.
text.zh: 每天免費送你 10,000 個神經元（每天 UTC 00:00 重置）。超過後付費方案是每 1,000 個神經元 0.011 美元——只為實際用量付費。

en: Different models cost different amounts of Neurons — bigger models cost more per request.
Put AI Gateway in front of Workers AI to cache repeated answers and cut cost.
Test locally with 'wrangler dev' before deploying.
Browse all models and their IDs in the Cloudflare dashboard or docs.
zh: 不同模型耗用的神經元不同——模型越大，每次請求越貴。
在 Workers AI 前面加上 AI Gateway，可以快取重複的答案、省下費用。
部署前先用『wrangler dev』在本機測試。
可在 Cloudflare 控制台或文件裡瀏覽所有模型和它們的代號。
